text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day leading up to the Takarazuka Kinen,
Admire Vega and Meisho Doto go to watch the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O, with otherworldly presence,
declares the beginning of a new chapter to the
fierce competition there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her incredible performance in the race, she
addresses Meisho Doto in the audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for you and you alone, she
shouts. It seems this is the last push Meisho Doto
needed to finally break out of her shell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto heads off for training. Seeing her
inspires Admire Vega to begin running herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, all four of them are ready. Surely this is a
sign that their senior year will be filled with
excitement.
